data_description.name: A name for your collection.
data_description.discogs_token: Generate a free personal token at discogs.com/settings/developers. Required when Discogs is enabled. You can add or update this later via Configure.
data_description.discogs_enabled: Allow the card to search Discogs for records and fetch cover art.
data_description.spotify_enabled: Allow the card to search Spotify and link records for playback. Requires the Music Assistant integration for speaker playback.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Vinyl Collection is already set up. Only one instance is supported.
